description: Part of a decorated ketubba. Location: Aleppo. Bride: [...] bt. Menaḥem. Groom: unnamed. Dated: probably [13]19 Seleucid = 1107/08 CE. Witnessed by Yoshiyya b. Yivḥar. Verso contains letters of the Hebrew alphabet. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
